How It Works

Four steps from zero to HODLer

01
🔗

Connect Wallet

Link your MetaMask, WalletConnect, or any EVM wallet in one click.

02
💰

Buy $DITTO

Swap ETH for DITTO directly through our built-in Uniswap integration.

03
📈

Stake & Earn

Lock your tokens in a staking tier to earn up to 80% APR.

04
💎

HODL & Burn

Every transaction burns tokens. The burn rate halves every 180 days — just like Bitcoin.

Staking Tiers

The longer you lock, the more you earn

🌱
Sprout
Lock 30 days
1x 20% APR
🌊
Wave
Lock 90 days
2x 40% APR
⚡
Surge
Lock 180 days
3x 60% APR
🔥
Inferno
Lock 365 days
4x 80% APR

Roadmap

Where we're going

Phase 1 — Launch 🚀

ERC20 deployment, Uniswap liquidity, presale rounds, audit, website launch, community building.

Phase 2 — Staking 📈

Four-tier staking vault goes live. Multi-asset collateral. Chainlink price feeds. First halving event.

Phase 3 — Governance 🗳️

DAO launch. Treasury votes. Community-directed burn events. CEX listings.

Phase 4 — Ecosystem 🌐

L2 expansion, cross-chain bridges, NFT collection, partnerships, merchant integrations.

Ready to Join the Movement?

420 billion tokens. Deflationary. Community-first. Get your DITTO before the next burn cycle.
